mapper.select: SELECT normalized_name FROM ingredient_aliases WHERE alias_name = #{aliasName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO ingredient_aliases (alias_name, normalized_name) VALUES (#{aliasName}, #{normalizedName})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM ingredients WHERE normalized_name = #{normalizedName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_ingredients (user_id, name, normalized_name, quantity, unit, type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{normalizedName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{type}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN #{quantity} ELSE quantity + #{quantity} END, unit = #{unit}, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, name, normalized_name as normalizedName, quantity, unit, type FROM user_ingredients WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
